productName: Infused Bubble Hash Little Snappers - Orange Truffle - 5pk (5x0.5g)
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Orange Truffle flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a sweet, juicy orange flavor, with a versatile, anytime balance. A little goes a long way.
